stemHtml: What is the principle of the Index method?

options.a: To compute the CG position and stabiliser trim setting without completing a load sheet.
options.b: To refer every item of the aircraft to a position called the BA (Balance Arm).
options.c: To determine the CG position by reference to the Mean Aerodynamic Chord.
options.d: To divide high-magnitude moments by a constant and make them more user-friendly.
